generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived through enough to know - being prepared isn't about fear, it's about common sense. Our community emergency response teams saved lives during the last power outage because we had the right training and supplies. Why would anyone want to cut funding for programs that keep us safe when disasters hit? #CivilDefenseMatters #PreparednessSavesLives
